title: poa secunda var. ampla
intro: Poa secunda var. ampla, also known as blue grama, is a perennial grass native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Native American medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Poa secunda var. ampla can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
